customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of excellent quality, with solid build construction and an attractive appearance that looks great on doors. The installation process is well-executed, and customers appreciate its ease of use, particularly as a main door security solution. Moreover, they like its features, with one customer highlighting its multiple access options, and consider it good value for money. However, functionality receives mixed reviews, with some customers reporting issues with the fingerprint scanner stopping unexpectedly.

reviews.author: ATISH DHAWARE
reviews.title: The services paid by Mr Abdul is fantastic and qubo door lock is outstanding
reviews.body: Abdul the technician from the Qubo was delivered at my place with wonderful and pleasant service . He is so humble and very decent with his services . Thank you qubo and Mr Abdul Sir .

reviews.author: Nilesh Grasia
reviews.title: Timely Amazon Delivery, but Qubo Service is a Nightmare – 30 Days and No Part!
reviews.body: I purchased the QUBO Smart Door Lock Select on April 21, 2025. While Amazon delivered the product perfectly on time, my experience with the brand "Qubo" has been a disaster. The Issue: Upon installation, I discovered that the back panel (indoor unit) had a broken connector pin, making it impossible to power the lock via batteries. It only works when connected to a Type-C cable. The Service Failure: 1. Paid but Not Delivered: Since Qubo doesn't offer service in my area (Patan, Chhattisgarh), I agreed to pay for a replacement back panel. 2. 30-Day Delay: It has been 30 days since I paid, and I h

reviews.author: Manik
reviews.title: Horrible customer service
reviews.body: When you buy from a big brand, you naturally expect premium quality, excellent performance, and a product that justifies the higher price tag. Unfortunately, this product falls short of that expectation. Yes, it carries a big brand name, and the packaging, marketing, and presentation are impressive. But when it comes to actual performance, it is just average—nothing extraordinary, nothing that truly stands out compared to cheaper alternatives in the market. • Build quality: Feels okay, but not premium. • Features: Very standard, nothing innovative. • Performance: Works, but not flawlessly—defi

reviews.author: Kanraj Jain
reviews.title: Good Features, but Fingerprint Sensitivity Needs Improvement
reviews.body: The Qubo Smart Lock offers great functionality overall—keyless entry works seamlessly, and the mobile app integration is smooth. Installation was fairly straightforward, and the build quality feels solid and premium. However, one major drawback I faced was while trying to register fingerprints. It consistently failed to recognize or register my wife’s fingerprint, no matter how many times we tried. This could be a serious limitation for elderly users or those with faint fingerprint patterns. Pros: • Sleek design and good build quality • Easy to install • Convenient keyless entry with multiple
